Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Sorry for the sudden invite, but I'm thinking about getting something to eat right now. Do you want to join me?[n]{f 1 5 0}I'm in front of Iwatodai Station.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It's been a while since I told you I'd return the favor. It's about time for me to pay up, so meet me in front of Iwatodai Station.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Somehow, even after all that's happened, I can still feel hungry.[n]{f 1 5 0}If you're free, I'd like you to come shopping with me. I wanna try something out, so if you can make it, come meet me at Iwatodai Station.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It'd be nice if you could join me in my training regimen.[n]{f 1 5 0}Come meet me at Iwatodai Station if you're feeling up to it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It's a new year already, but I still intend on keeping my word.[n]{f 1 5 0}I know it's a busy time, but let's go grab a meal together.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Can you survive this heat? Don't forget to stay hydrated.[n]{f 1 5 0}On another note, do you wanna catch a movie together? I hope they're showing something that would get our blood pumping.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I have some free time today. Do you wanna accompany me somewhere?[n]{f 1 5 0}I'm in front of Iwatodai Station.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I usually see Koromaru in front of the dorm.[n]{f 1 5 0}The other day, I brought him along with me on my jog. It was a good workout.[n]{f 1 5 0}You should hang out with him sometime.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}You're probably busy, but do you have time to meet me right now? I want to have a little chat with you.[n]{f 1 5 0}Come find me at Iwatodai Station.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}If you're free, can you spare a minute to help me out?[n]{f 1 5 0}I'm at Iwatodai Station.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Do you want to join me today?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_024_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Can you set some time aside for me?[n]{f 1 5 0}I'll be waiting at Iwatodai Station.[n]{f 1 1}
